arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals Aston Villa 'concern' and fires demand ahead of Chelsea
arts.sum: Unai Emery's main concern is that his Aston Villa players fail to channel their frustration correctly after going seven matches without a win, but accepts they are only human. When we are being very, very demanding and trying to keep our high level of our consistency and sometimes not getting it, the frustration we have to manage.

arts.ttl: Emery on coaching Chelsea's Jackson, fit-again Kamara and Villa's progress
arts.sum: "I'm very happy for him - but of course hopefully on Sunday he is not performing in his best way!"

arts.ttl: Chelsea star set for career-changing transfer
arts.sum: Real Betis and Villarreal are both interested in signing Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei on loan during the January transfer window, as per reports in Spain. Enzo Fernandez, Moises Caicedo and Romeo Lavia are firmly ahead of Casadei in the pecking order at Stamford Bridge and with Andrey Santos set to be rewarded with a first-team place next season, he may need to leave Chelsea to further his career.

arts.ttl: How Liam Delap to Chelsea could ALTER the 2025 transfer market
arts.sum: Although Man Utd have scouted Delap on several occasions, Chelsea have linked with pursuing a deal for the 21-year-old for a little while longer and they could launch a formal offer in 2025. The England U21 international left Manchester City to join Ipswich on a permanent deal in July and he has scored six goals in 12 Premier League appearances since his €17.9 million move to Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca drops biggest Christopher Nkunku Chelsea hint yet with clear Aston Villa message
arts.sum: It is not that Nkunku cannot play as a lone striker - where he has mostly started from in Europe and when used as a substitute - but he isn't a focal point like Jackson and is better at combining play from slightly deeper, linking up with a No.9 instead of being the tip of an attack . After all, Nkunku rarely looks like he is trying (he probably isn't fully) in the Conference League and he still shows comfortably more quality than anyone is able to deal with.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Aston Villa: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Aston Villa, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Filip Jorgensen sends perfect Enzo Maresca message as Jadon Sancho reality clear
arts.sum: The Danish goalkeeper is Chelsea's No.2 behind Robert Sanchez, who has started all of the Blues' Premier League games to date this season. Sancho, though, is ideal for Chelsea when going against the low-block.

arts.ttl: Maurizio Sarri makes HUGE Chelsea prediction
arts.sum: “The situation at the beginning of the season was difficult with so many players but for sure he [Maresca] is doing a good job,” Sarri told The Sun . Former Chelsea boss Maurizio Sarri has hailed the impact of Enzo Maresca at Stamford Bridge and has stated that the Blues could have a “winning future” under the Italian.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa predicted XI vs. Chelsea: Possible lineup for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Aston Villa could line up for Sunday's Premier League trip to face Chelsea at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs. Aston Villa: Possible XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Chelsea could line up for Sunday's Premier League match against Aston Villa at Stamford Bridge.
